missed_changes: Made specific token-level investments with multi-year lockups (ZRO $55M, EIGEN $70M) — prediction had empty tokens_excited
Privacy via secure hardware/TEE (Seismic) rather than the ZK-on-client approach, which he explicitly contrasts as better for composability
Notable embrace of and engagement with Solana (hosting Anatoly/Toly, SolanaConf, crypto x AI panels) and DeFi composability (Universal, Halliday, Base)
notes: The window is heavily portfolio-announcement driven (a16z investments), which strongly confirms the long-horizon tech sectors: ZK (Aleo, Aztec), privacy (Seismic, Aztec), AI x crypto (Gensyn, decentralized AI verification), DePIN (Helium), restaking (Eigen/EigenCloud), and interop (LayerZero, Universal). Formal verification, the speculative-casino critique, and the memecoin critique were never addressed in the window. The fragmentation concern is supported indirectly via the Universal thesis (solving cross-chain/asset fragmentation to restore composability). Risk_regime 'no_view' holds — all activity is tech/builder conviction with explicit not-investment-advice disclaimers and lockups, no market-timing calls. The main unanticipated move is taking concrete token positions despite an intentionally empty tokens_excited bucket.
